nasb.text: And You have not given me over into the hand of the enemy; You have set my feet in a large place.

esv.text: and you have not delivered me into the hand of the enemy; you have set my feet in a broad place.

cnv.text: 你沒有把我交在仇敵的手裡， 你使我的腳站穩在寬闊之地。

ccb.text: 你没有将我交给仇敌， 而是领我到宽阔之地。

csbs.text: 你没有把我交在仇敌的手中， 却使我的脚站在宽阔之地。
